## What's Changed
### Other
* V0.4.0 by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/42
* Security: fix Safari 13 regex lookbehind, data URL injection, and XSS via rehype-sanitize by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/45
* Fix security, correctness, and accessibility issues from review by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/46
* Fix path traversal, episodic filter pollution, pipeline no-op, and several correctness issues by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/47
* fix: async fs IO, episodic min_importance, pipeline checkpoint recovery, env var substitution, personality test paths by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/48
* 0.5.0 by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/44


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0
